result:
Two things to flag:

**Title fix:** Patch is at `runtime/drafts/i1-blank-title-fix.patch`. It adds a `validateTitle` helper to `parse.ts` (same pattern as `validateSlug`) and wires it into `parse()`, removing the silent-passthrough comment. Commit + push approval artifact is at `runtime/queue/approvals/i1-commit-and-push.md`. A human needs to apply the patch and run the git commands.

**`legacy_cache.ts` is not dead code.** `pipeline.ts:11` imports `isUnchanged` and `remember` from it, and the `build` function calls both on every render pass (lines 23-28). Deleting it breaks the build. I left it out of the approval artifact. If you want to remove it, `pipeline.ts` needs to drop the cache-skip logic first, which is the ADR-0004 work.
